mentions.note: Good company, bad stock. Owned since $20s (late 2023), peaked $48 (June 2025), back near buy level. Beat last time but weak guidance. Anomaly mentioned in 100X segment—potentially undervalued if story improves.

Cheapest ever at 17x earnings despite solid fundamentals: stable pet industry, secular e-commerce shift, auto-ship 84% (sticky), expanding margins via AI. Street avg PT $40+. Expect larger rally ahead.
High-growth pet e-commerce hit hard by war/oil prices; can't recommend buy until war resolves and consumer strength returns.
Concern about pet spending weakness; Cramer thinks Chewy might miss when it reports, similar to Petco miss. Consumer discretionary pressure evident across pet retail.
